title: Service
description: Output of an organization involving at least one activity performed between the organization and the customer, or a software component in a service-oriented architecture providing functionality or ...

definitions.definition: Output of an organization involving at least one activity performed between the organization and the customer, or a software component in a service-oriented architecture providing functionality or realizing capabilities.
